title: Comedy Gameplay Video Editing
brief: I have raw gameplay captures that need to be transformed into entertaining YouTube uploads packed with jokes, quick punch-ins, and meme-style cutaways. The finished piece should feel like a comedy sketch layered over the match footage—think rapid reaction zooms, text call-outs, popular sound bites, and the occasional on-screen meme to drive home the punchlines. The core content is pure gameplay, so pacing matters; I want viewers laughing every few seconds, never waiting for the next highlight. Feel free to trim dead air aggressively, weave in jump cuts, and time edits to the beat of background tracks. I’ll supply the footage, my rough time-stamped notes on funny moments, any custom graphics, and a royalty-free music folder. Deliverables: • One fully edited 1080p (or higher) video ready for YouTube, encoded in H.264 • Matching project file so I can tweak small details later • Thumbnail frame suggestion exported as a PNG If you already have a library of memes, sound effects, or motion graphics, bring them on; originality and tasteful humor are welcome as long as they stay within YouTube’s guidelines.
